title: JavaUI
description: Gives Java Edition's buttons an OreUI feel!
body:
This texturepack changes the look of the buttons to feel like OreUI without taking away the stone-like buttons java has
I originally made these for [Raspberry Flavoured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/raspberry-flavoured), but i decided to make them into a proper texturepack because a few people asked a while ago lol

![Chat settings menu with the new buttons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bbd6ca6d8b48cc78e22ef725841b41bd6c71869.png)
